event: View of the Bridge at Sevres and the Hills
description: A naive-style landscape depicting a panoramic view from an elevated vantage point. In the foreground, rooftops and a bridge with arched spans cross the middle distance. Behind, wooded hills rise with scattered houses and a prominent white building. Tall dark cypress trees line the right edge. In the sky above, three flying machines appear: a white biplane at left, a dark hot-air balloon at center, and a golden airship or dirigible at right. The palette is muted with greens, browns, and grey-blue sky.

_meta.title: View of the Bridge at Sevres and the Hills at Clamart St. Cloud and Bellevue
